mnemonic: mistake [мистэ'йк] ошибка - Это не ошибка, это какая-то (мистэйк-а*) ('Мистика).

examples.eng: You are mistaken.
Anyone can make a mistake.
It's only a small mistake.
Never mind your mistake.
I stupidly made the mistake of giving them my phone number.
examples.ru: Я совершил глупейшую ошибку, дав им свой номер телефона.

examples.eng: Did he admit his mistake?
It's your decision, but I warn you - you're making a mistake.
examples.ru: Решать, конечно, вам, но предупреждаю: вы делаете ошибку.

examples.eng: I mistook him for his brother.
examples.ru: Я принял его за его брата.

examples.eng: Some of our decisions were wrong, but you have to learn from your mistakes.
examples.ru: Некоторые наши решения были ошибочны, но нужно учиться на своих ошибках.

examples.eng: It was a careless mistake.
It proved to be a costly mistake.
The typist made a mistake.
She only realized her mistake when it was too late.
examples.ru: Она только тогда поняла свою ошибку, когда было уже слишком поздно.

examples.eng: One mistake and you're toast.
There's a mistake in the schedule.
There must be some mistake.
We made a mistake about that.
This mistake cost him his job.
Buying that house was a big mistake.
examples.ru: Покупка этого дома была большой ошибкой.

examples.eng: One silly mistake cost them the match.
examples.ru: Одна глупая ошибка стоила им матча.

examples.eng: Don't mistake her for her twin sister.
I've made a dreadful mistake.
It was a regrettable mistake.
Mistakes abound on every page.
He felt cheap about his mistake.
examples.ru: Он почувствовал себя глупо из-за своей ошибки.

examples.eng: You're making a ghastly mistake.
You're making a terrible mistake.
That mistake is no laughing matter.
Buying the house seemed a great idea at the time, but now I can see it was a mistake.
examples.ru: В то время мысль о покупке дома казалась превосходной, но теперь я понимаю, что это было ошибкой.

examples.eng: He brooded over his mistake.
